content.text: {"component":"accessing","summary":"Strong Symfony 8 account-access service with clear manifests and broad tests; main gap is delivery/ops automation and the missing Antora report path.","strengths":["Clear product identity and scope documented (manifests, README).","Symfony 8 stack with security, 2FA, verification, and reset-password bundles.","Well-structured domain folders (Entity, Repository, Service, ValueObject, Interfaces).","Comprehensive test layout (Unit, Integration, Functional, Panther, Playwright).","Static analysis and code style tooling wired via composer scripts.","Recent migration history suggesting active development."],"risks":["No GitHub Actions workflows detected; CI/CD automation is missing.","Antora report path from registry is absent in the repo, blocking report rendering.","Dist-only configs for phpunit/phpstan may lead to inconsistent local setups/enforcement.","Limited observability beyond logging bundles; no metrics/tracing in evidence.","Proprietary license may constrain external adoption."],"next_actions":["Add a minimal GitHub Actions workflow running composer install and scripts pipeline:local:full.","Promote phpunit.xml.dist to phpunit.xml with coverage thresholds and run in CI.","Promote phpstan.neon.dist to phpstan.neon with defined level/baseline and gate in CI.","Add Playwright E2E job to CI (npm ci; playwright install; npm run test:e2e).","Create the Antora report at .antora-src/modules/ROOT/pages/component/accessing/report/index.adoc to unblock publishing.","Introduce basic metrics/tracing instrumentation and dashboards, beyond logging.","Document and pin operational runbook details in config/MANIFEST.md or README (envs, secrets, migrations)."],"notes":["Assessment grounded in repository scan at master bb0013dfbd4df3f201d4cae167f5de4bdf58967f on 2026-04-05.","Composer requires PHP ^8.4 and Symfony 8; security and rate-limiting bundles are present.","Multiple *MANIFEST.md documents provide intentional architecture/product context."],"confidence":"medium","evidence_paths":["README.md","composer.json","PRODUCT_MANIFEST.md","ARCHITECTURE_MANIFEST.md","BOUNDING_MANIFEST.md","FULL_MANIFEST.md","config/bundles.php","config/services.yaml","public/index.php","phpstan.neon.dist","phpunit.xml.dist","tests/Unit","tests/Integration","tests/Functional","tests/Panther","tests/Playwright","package.json","playwright.config.ts","migrations/MANIFEST.md"],"suggested_score_overrides":{"product":null,"architecture":null,"runtime":null,"qa":8.3,"ops":7.6,"market":null,"overall":8.2},"metric_updates":{"product":{"summary":"Product identity and scope are explicitly documented and aligned with an account-access service (registration, verification, MFA, recovery, sessions, security events).","risks":["Antora report path is missing, reducing discoverability of product documentation."],"improvements":["Publish the component report at the configured Antora path and cross-link from README."],"evidence":["composer.json","README.md","PRODUCT_MANIFEST.md","FULL_MANIFEST.md"]},"architecture":{"summary":"Symfony 8 architecture with clear domain separation (entities, repositories, services, value objects) and intent captured in manifests.","risks":["Architectural governance and boundaries are described but not yet enforced via CI or automated checks."],"improvements":["Encode key architecture rules in static analysis/phpmd rulesets and enforce in CI."],"evidence":["ARCHITECTURE_MANIFEST.md","BOUNDING_MANIFEST.md","config/services.yaml","src/Entity","src/Repository","src/Service","src/ValueObject"]},"runtime":{"summary":"Runtime shape is standard Symfony (public front controller, configuration bootstrap, routes, env files) with logging and rate limiting available.","risks":["Operational runtime characteristics (healthchecks, readiness probes, instrumentation) are not visible in the repo."],"improvements":["Add health/readiness endpoints and basic runtime instrumentation to support operations."],"evidence":["public/index.php","config/bootstrap.php","config/routes.yaml","config/bundles.php",".env",".env.test"]},"qa":{"summary":"Broad test coverage surface (Unit, Integration, Functional, browser/E2E) with static analysis and style tools available via composer scripts.","risks":["CI gating for tests and static analysis is absent; phpunit/phpstan only have dist configs, risking drift across environments."],"improvements":["Create phpunit.xml with coverage thresholds; add phpstan.neon with level/baseline; run both in CI with fail-on-violation."],"evidence":["tests/Unit","tests/Integration","tests/Functional","tests/Panther","tests/Playwright","composer.json","phpunit.xml.dist","phpstan.neon.dist","package.json","playwright.config.ts"]},"ops":{"summary":"Basic operational readiness exists locally (logging via Monolog, composer pipeline script), but delivery automation and observability depth are missing.","risks":["No GitHub Actions workflows found; no visible metrics/tracing/alerting setup."],"improvements":["Add CI workflows running the full composer pipeline and Playwright tests; add metrics/tracing and basic alerting."],"evidence":["composer.json","config/bundles.php","config/MANIFEST.md"]},"market":{"summary":"Business-facing positioning is clear for an account-access component; repository manifests and README communicate scope and core entity.","risks":["Proprietary license may limit community adoption and contributions."],"improvements":["Clarify intended distribution and integration model in README (targets, SLAs, versioning policy)."],"evidence":["composer.json","README.md","PRODUCT_MANIFEST.md"]},"overall":{"summary":"Pre-RC posture with strong product/architecture and testing surface; primary blocker is the absence of CI/CD and missing Antora report path.","risks":["Lack of CI/CD reduces release confidence; report path absence blocks portfolio visibility."],"improvements":["Introduce minimal CI/CD and publish the Antora report to elevate to RC readiness."],"evidence":["README.md","composer.json","ARCHITECTURE_MANIFEST.md","PRODUCT_MANIFEST.md"]}}}
